title: Transformation Attempts of the Ichthyosporean Sphaeroforma arctica
author: Elena Casacuberta
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.z6ef9be
materials: Cells were seeded 24 hours prior transfection
200.000 cells per transfecion condition were tested

steps.title: Tested techniques and settings are as...
steps.instruction: Tested techniques and settings are as follows (with 1 to 5 micrograms of DNA endogenous promoter (actin) plus fluorescent reporter (venus or mCherry) %s %s S.arctica Neon 1000-2500V, 10-40 ms, 1-3 pulses n/a (not successful) Lipofectamina n/a (not successful) LONZA® 16 preset codes P3/P4/P5 buffer n/a (not successful)

steps.title: cells were recovered inmediately in MB...
steps.instruction: cells were recovered inmediately in MB medium and inspected for positive transfection by fluorescence after 24, 48 and up to 5 days.
